creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello Lance. Sorry for delay. I can't reproduce it - it is all fine 
here. But there is the issue that tarballs at sourcefourge are different 
than pypi tarballs. I had discussion about this with upstream maintainer 
in past, but there is no solution yet. Would you please revert your 
checksum change, execute make: stopped in /home/rm in port's directory, 
make sure that you are using tarball from sourceforge. If it's ok for 
ypu, I'll just comment out the pypi mirror for a while. Thank you
